name: easyrunner-skills
description: Agent skills for driving EasyRunner (the single-server self-hosting PaaS) without learning the er CLI. Covers server provisioning plus er app repo prep, app create, deploy, and update.

compatibility.notes: Skills wrap the public `er` CLI command surface. The plugin version mirrors the `er` CLI release it was generated from. If `er --version` differs significantly, upgrade `er` (or the plugin) to keep the command surface in sync.
